title: Peschiera salzmannii
taxonomy: Peschiera salzmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae, commonly known as the willowherb family. It is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Peschiera, which is a group of flowering plants. The species is further classified into the family Onagraceae, order Myrtales, and class Magnoliopsida. Within the Onagraceae family, it is placed alongside other flowering plants such as the evening primrose and the willowherb. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of the species.
